title: Algorithms
content:
algorithms # prepartion # Algorithms = Datastructure + Thinking sort # callback
public interface Comparable<Item>{ public int compareTo(Item that); } two basic operation
// if v is less than w, return -1 public static boolean less(Comparable v, Comparable w){ return v.compareTo(w) < 0; } public static void exchange(Comparable[] a, int i, int j){ Comparable swap = a[i]; a[i] = a[j]; a[j] = swap; } selection sort # public class Selection { public static void sort(Comparable[] a){ int len = a.length; for (int i=0;i<len;i++){ for (int j=i+1;j<len;j++){ if (less(a[j],a[i])){ exchange(a, i, j); } } } } private static boolean less(Comparable v, Comparable w){ return v.compareTo(w) < 0; } private static void exchange(Comparable[] a, int i, int j){ Comparable swap = a[i]; a[i] = a[j]; a[j] = swap; } public static boolean isSorted(Comparable[] a){ for (int i=1;i<a.length;i++){ if (less(a[i],a[i-1])){ return false; } } return true; } } if the array is sorted, it does not matter to selection sort the number of compare is about : $ N^2 $, the number of exchange is about : $ N $ , proof as below ![proof](remember to add) insertion sort # public class Insert { public static void sort(Comparable[] a){ int len = a.length; for (int i=0;i<len;i++){ for (int j=i;j>0;j--){ if(less(a[j], a[j-1])){ exchange(a, j, j-1); }else{ break; } } } } private static boolean less(Comparable v, Comparable w){ return v.compareTo(w) < 0; } private static void exchange(Comparable[] a, int i, int j){ Comparable swap = a[i]; a[i] = a[j]; a[j] = swap; } public static boolean isSorted(Comparable[] a){ for (int i=1;i<a.length;i++){ if (less(a[i],a[i-1])){ return false; } } return true; } } But, this code is more elegant,just 4 line
for (int i=0;i<len;i++){ for(int j=i;j>0 && less(a[j],a[j-1],j--)) exchange(a[j],a[j-1]); } the number of compare is about: $ N^21/4 $,the number of exchange is about : $ N^21/4 $ partially-sorted arrays
Inversion : a pair of key that are out of order
proposition the number of exchange is equal to the number of inversion the number of compare is greater than or equal to the number of inversion and litter than or equal to the number of array minux one shell sort # public class Shell { // 3x+1 increment sequence public static void sort(Comparable[] a){ int len = a.length; int h = 1; // why h < len/3? while(h<len/3){ h = 3*h+1; } while(h>0){ for (int i=0;i<len;i++){ // there, should j >= h instead of j > 0; for (int j=i;j>=h && less(a[j], a[j-h]);j-=h){ exchange(a, j, j-h); } } h = h - 3; } } private static boolean less(Comparable v, Comparable w){ return v.compareTo(w) < 0; } private static void exchange(Comparable[] a, int i, int j){ Comparable swap = a[i]; a[i] = a[j]; a[j] = swap;y } public static boolean isSorted(Comparable[] a){ for (int i=1;i<a.length;i++){ if (less(a[i],a[i-1])){ return false; } } return true; } } Search # Symbol tables # QUESTION # greedy algorithm # greedy algorithm & sort

title: Os
content:
![[Pasted image 20240612184118.png]] [[#Linux Syscall Implement|Linux Syscall Implement]] [[#Linux Syscall Implement#What is syscall|What is syscall]] [[#Linux Syscall Implement#to find syscall|to find syscall]] [[#Linux Syscall Implement#Vsyscall & Vdso|Vsyscall & Vdso]] [[#Linux Syscall Implement#Syscall and Interupt|Syscall and Interupt]] [[#Linux Syscall Implement#Reference|Reference]] Linux Syscall Implement # What is syscall # syscall behavior syscall and int 0x80 (1)将当前函数执行地址(rip寄存器的值)保存到rcx中； (2)将当前标志寄存器rflag的值保存到r11寄存器中； (3)通过修改rip跳转到MSR_LSTAR寄存器指向的内核函数入口； (4)根据MSR_SYSCALL_MASK寄存器修改rflag寄存器。 How to observe this?
What is the syscall entry syscall_init syscall invoke chain #define __LIBRARY__ #include <unistd.h> #include <stdarg.h> int open(const char * filename, int flag, ...) { register int res; va_list arg; va_start(arg,flag); __asm__("int $0x80" :"=a" (res) :"0" (__NR_open),"b" (filename),"c" (flag), "d" (va_arg(arg,int))); if (res>=0) return res; errno = -res; return -1; } privilege - HardWare Design
CS: code , last two bit, CPL DS: date, last two bit, RPL DPL : destination privilege level check : if CPL < DPL or CPL = DPL; RPL < DPL or RPL = DPL ![[Pasted image 20240608174254.png]] Interupt for Intel x86, INT INTERUPT
// in lib/close.c _syscall1(int,close,int,fd) // in include/unistd.h #define _syscall1(type,name,atype,a) \ type name(atype a) \ { \ long __res; \ __asm__ volatile ("int $0x80" \ : "=a" (__res) \ : "0" (__NR_##name),"b" ((long)(a))); \ if (__res >= 0) \ return (type) __res; \ errno = -__res; \ return -1; \ } // personal open this micro _syscall(int,close,int fd)\ int close(int fd) \ { long_res; _asm_ volatile("int $0x80" \ : "=fd" (_res) \ : "0" (__NR_##close), "b" ((long)(fd));\ if (__res >= 0) \ return (int) __res; \ errno = __res; \ return -1; \ ) } to find syscall # strace & itrace /proc/[pid]/syscall ![[image-1.png]]
Vsyscall & Vdso # also look this
Syscall and Interupt # Reference # Linux 核心設計: System call

content: How to fix the file name except xxx.md: ls algorithms.md Main.class Selection.class Test.java Comparable.class Main.java Selection.java Comparable.java selection Test.class I can get xxx.md by ".*\.md" ,use grep -v: ls | grep -v ".*\.md" Comparable.class Comparable.java Main.class Main.java selection Selection.class Selection.java Test.class Test.java I just want to use re language
